Metadata.title: 3C Waypoint | Marketing Infrastructure for Customs Brokers
Metadata.description: Enterprise marketing infrastructure for U.S. customs brokers, freight forwarders, NVOCCs, and trade compliance firms.

Hero.eyebrow: STRATEGIC TRADE INTELLIGENCE PARTNER · NCBFAA · AAEI · TPM
Hero.copy: Built for customs brokers, freight forwarders, NVOCCs and trade compliance firms operating in regulated U.S. trade environments.

Services.title: A technical growth platform for regulated trade operators.
Services.copy: 3C Waypoint turns complex customs expertise into visible, durable commercial authority across search, content, executive presence, and importer acquisition touchpoints.

items.title: Search Authority Infrastructure
items.description: Technical SEO programs for HTSUS, UFLPA, ISF, AD/CVD, drawback, FTZ, and broker-specific acquisition pages. We build the content your buyers find when they search for compliance answers.

items.title: Importer Demand Positioning
items.description: Market narratives, landing pages, and location signals built for importers evaluating customs brokers and forwarding partners. Your firm positioned where the decision begins.

items.title: Executive Credibility Systems
items.description: LinkedIn programs, thought leadership, and technical content operations that make regulated trade expertise visible before procurement begins. We speak comex natively.

items.title: Conversion Diagnostics
items.description: Website, SERP, and message audits that identify where qualified importer intent is leaking from your pipeline. Fixed-fee diagnostic, time-boxed, actionable.

Authority.title: Positioning that respects the complexity of U.S. trade.
Authority.copy: Customs brokerage buyers do not respond to generic marketing language. They evaluate precision, risk literacy, jurisdictional competence, and the ability to explain regulated movement clearly.
points: Built for U.S. customs brokers, freight forwarders, NVOCCs, and trade compliance firms.
Structured around regulated-search behavior, importer risk questions, and compliance-driven buyer evaluation.
Designed to support long-term authority pages, technical content libraries, and sales-ready positioning.
Operates as strategic marketing infrastructure, not a generalist agency campaign.

TradeIntelligence.title: Strategy informed by how importers search, compare, and de-risk.
TradeIntelligence.copy: 3C Waypoint connects technical trade topics to commercial discovery: the questions importers search, the compliance pages they trust, and the proof signals they need before reaching out.

RadarTheory.title: The Radar Theory™ — our strategic framework for regulated trade brands.
RadarTheory.copy: A customs radar detects, tracks, and prioritizes cargo before it reaches the border. A brand radar does the same for commercial opportunity — detecting the buyer's signal before your competitor does. Four quadrants: DETECT · CALIBRATE · POSITION · RESPOND.

quadrants.label: DETECT
quadrants.description: Market intelligence. Tariff shifts, regulatory change, importer-side pain signals.

quadrants.label: CALIBRATE
quadrants.description: Sharpen your value proposition against the detected signal.

quadrants.label: POSITION
quadrants.description: Build brand architecture, voice, and proof that wins the trust round.

quadrants.label: RESPOND
quadrants.description: Ship content, campaigns, and sales enablement that convert signals into pipeline.

CTA.title: Find the authority gaps between your trade expertise and your next importer.
CTA.copy: Request a focused review of search visibility, regulated-topic positioning, page architecture, and buyer credibility signals.

Footer.copy: Premium B2B marketing infrastructure for U.S. customs brokers, freight forwarders, NVOCCs, and trade compliance firms.
Footer.partner: The radar that detects your next importer before your competitor does.
